comments: Gallows Corner Flyover Refurbishment - [A12] Eastern Avenue East (All directions) at the junction of [A12] Colchester Road - Various restrictions to facilitate the refurbishment of Gallows Corner Flyover. Full closure westbound of the Flyover and westbound A12 and A127. Re-opening date to be confirmed. In addition there are lane restrictions on the A12 eastbound and on all approaches to Gallows Corner roundabout to facilitate reconstructing and resurfacing.
currentUpdate: Use alternative routes. Eastbound routes have reopened, and part of the Gallows Corner roundabout is now accessible.There is on average an additional travel time is 2-4 minutes for buses and road users on Ardleigh Green Road, Gubbins Lane, and Gooshays Drive. There are 2-3 minute delays on North Street heading away from Romford. Minor delays continue towards the A127 restrictions. Additional congestion is also likely on the westbound A13 and the M11 southbound during peak periods as drivers seek alternative routes.
